Scan.title: Scan
Scan.description: A record of a document scan and its analysis.

id.description: The unique identifier for the scan.

userId.description: The UID of the user who performed the scan.

imageUrl.description: The URL or base64 data of the scanned document image.

summary.description: The AI-generated summary of the document.

rights.description: The 3 legal rights/options identified by AI.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the scan was created.
